recommendations.title: The Outlaw
recommendations.overview: Newly appointed sheriff Pat Garrett is pleased when his old friend Doc Holliday arrives in Lincoln, New Mexico on the stage. Doc is trailing his stolen horse, and it is discovered in the possession of Billy the Kid. In a surprising turnaround, Billy

recommendations.title: The Quiet Earth
recommendations.overview: After a top-secret experiment misfires, a scientist may be the only man left alive in the world.

recommendations.title: Pat Garrett & Billy the Kid
recommendations.overview: Pat Garrett is hired as a lawman on behalf of a group of wealthy New Mexico cattle barons to bring down his old friend Billy the Kid.

recommendations.title: Freejack
recommendations.overview: Time-traveling bounty hunters find a doomed race-car driver in the past and bring him to 2009 New York, where his mind will be replaced with that of a terminally ill billionaire.

recommendations.title: Young Guns
recommendations.overview: A group of young gunmen, led by Billy the Kid, become deputies to avenge the murder of the rancher who became their benefactor. But when Billy takes their authority too far, they become the hunted.

recommendations.title: Chisum
recommendations.overview: Cattle baron John Chisum joins forces with Billy the Kid and Pat Garrett to fight the Lincoln County Land War in the New Mexico Territory of 1878.

recommendations.title: Fortress 2
recommendations.overview: 7 years on from the original Fortress movie, Brennick and his family are still on the run. Finally, they give in, and surrender, only to find themselves imprisoned in a new, more sophisticated fortress prison in outer space. But Brennick's not a man

recommendations.title: Under Siege 2: Dark Territory
recommendations.overview: A passenger train has been hijacked by an electronics expert and turned into an untraceable command center for a weapons satellite. He has planned to blow up Washington DC and only one man can stop him, former Navy SEAL Casey Ryback.

recommendations.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
recommendations.overview: A captured mustang remains determined to return to his herd no matter what.

recommendations.title: The Kid
